description: Knowledge base hooks: remind AI to check KB on new prompts and summarize work on completion

hooks.prompt: If the user's prompt is a substantive task (not a simple greeting or question), return JSON: {"systemMessage": "Reminder: check ~/.claude/knowledge-base/ for relevant knowledge entries before starting."}. Otherwise return empty JSON: {}.

Return ONLY valid JSON, no other text. If substantive work was done (architecture decisions, bug fixes, new patterns discovered), return: {"decision": "approve", "systemMessage": "Consider saving key findings to ~/.claude/knowledge-base/ using /kb-add."}. Otherwise return: {"decision": "approve"}.
